description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout with multiple rooms visible from above. The front facade includes a covered carport with space for two vehicles, a paved driveway, and a small landscaped area. The rear of the property boasts a large private garden with a rectangular swimming pool, surrounded by lush greenery and mature trees. The exterior walls are predominantly white with some wooden panel accents, and large windows provide ample natural light throughout the home. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall, offering both privacy and security. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a carport, large windows, and a private backyard featuring a pool and landscaped garden. The design highlights open spaces, white walls, and wood accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, driveway, and main entrance with landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long white exterior wall, carport, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the spacious garden, swimming pool, and tree-lined boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the garden, pool, and a clear look at the flat roof and rear entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
